title: T-018 — POST /api/production/work-orders/:id/resume endpoint + close downtime
prompt:
# T-018 — POST /work-orders/:id/resume

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.1 FR-08-E1-003, §8.2.1, §10.1

## Goal
Implement POST resume performing PAUSED→IN_PROGRESS with side-effect close_downtime_event (set ended_at, duration_min computed by GENERATED column).

## Implementation contract
App Router POST handler. Zod body {transaction_id: uuid, operator_id: uuid, actual_duration_min?: integer}. withIdempotency. Atomic transaction: assert WO.status='PAUSED' else 409, UPDATE work_orders.status='IN_PROGRESS', UPDATE the open downtime_events row WHERE wo_id=:id AND source='wo_pause' AND ended_at IS NULL SET ended_at=now (or actual_duration_min override resolves to ended_at = started_at + actual_duration_min minutes), update wo_executions.total_pause_duration_min += duration. Return 200 {wo_id, status:'IN_PROGRESS', resumed_at, downtime_event_id, duration_min}.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/resume/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/resume/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/resume-wo.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given WO PAUSED with one open downtime_events row (ended_at NULL), when POST /resume, then 200, downtime_events.ended_at set, duration_min populated by GENERATED column, wo_executions.total_pause_duration_min incremented
2. Given WO IN_PROGRESS, when POST /resume, then 409 invalid_state_transition
3. Given actual_duration_min override=15, when POST /resume, then ended_at = started_at + 15min (operator-corrected duration)

## Test strategy
- RED: route test asserting happy + 409 + override-duration before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test work-orders.*resume'

## Risk red lines
- Do not double-close already-ended downtime
- Do not change duration_min directly (V-PROD-06: GENERATED only — adjust via ended_at)
- Do not skip transaction atomicity

pipeline_inputs.description: POST /work-orders/:id/resume closes open downtime_event and transitions to IN_PROGRESS.
pipeline_inputs.details: Atomic: state PAUSED→IN_PROGRESS + close open downtime_events row matching wo_id+source='wo_pause'+ended_at IS NULL. Optional actual_duration_min override sets ended_at = started_at + override*60s. wo_executions.total_pause_duration_min cumulative.
acceptance_criteria: Given WO PAUSED with open downtime_events, when POST /resume, then 200 + ended_at set + duration_min populated + total_pause_duration_min incremented
Given WO IN_PROGRESS, when POST /resume, then 409 invalid_state_transition
Given override actual_duration_min=15, when POST /resume, then ended_at = started_at + 15min
test_strategy: RED: route test asserting happy + 409 + override before route exists
